data.content:
enables,reduces cost	Contextual Retrieval
Prompt Caching
Prompt Caching is described as making Contextual Retrieval possible at low cost.

loaded into,stored in	Cache
Reference Document
The reference document is loaded into the cache once.

component of,transformed into	Chunk
Contextualized Chunks
Chunks are processed to become contextualized chunks.

enables,supports	Claude
Contextual Retrieval
Claude is described as the system with which Contextual Retrieval is uniquely possible at low cost.

caches,reuses	Prompt Caching
Reference Document
Prompt Caching allows the reference document to be loaded once and reused instead of being passed for every chunk.

cost basis,measurement	Document Tokens
One-Time Cost
The one-time cost is expressed per million document tokens.

provides context for,used in generation	Context Instructions
Contextualized Chunks
Context instructions are part of the assumptions used to generate contextualized chunks.

defines,size assumption	800 Token Chunks
Chunk
The text states that chunks are assumed to contain 800 tokens.

has feature,includes	Claude
Prompt Caching
Claude is described as having the special prompt caching feature.

defines,size assumption	8k Token Documents
Reference Document
The text states that documents are assumed to contain 8k tokens.

references content for,supports generation	Cache
Contextualized Chunks
Previously cached content in the cache is referenced to generate contextualized chunks.

defines,size assumption	50 Token Context Instructions
Context Instructions
The text states that context instructions are assumed to contain 50 tokens.

applies to,context amount	100 Tokens Of Context Per Chunk
Chunk
The text states that each chunk is assumed to receive 100 tokens of context.

cost of,generation expense	Contextualized Chunks
One-Time Cost
The one-time cost refers to generating contextualized chunks.

cost of,generation expense	$1.02 Per Million Document Tokens
Contextualized Chunks
The text states that the one-time cost to generate contextualized chunks is $1.02 per million document tokens.
